case_title: CURTIS GUILLORY VS. ALMA GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, CURTIS HEARING SET FOR OCT-09-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, CURTIS

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-09-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF CURTIS GUILLORY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. CARLOS JATO APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 10/16/13 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR THE COURT TO REVIEW THE AMENDED APPLICATION THAT WAS SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, CURTIS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ALMA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-19-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-15-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-27-2014

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-16-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF CURTIS GUILLORY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, CARLOS JATO, ESQ, APPEARED AS WELL. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
